name: Example Thesis Two: Physical World Repricing
belief: The most durable companies in [your domain] will be the ones that make a previously uneconomic physical process economic — through engineering breakthroughs or novel deployment models. When the physics works, the moat is structural and nearly impossible to replicate with software alone.
qualifications: Novel hardware architectures with clear unit economics targets
Robotics and autonomous systems with measurable deployment ROI
Energy and materials science with physics-based differentiation
Industrial automation with a data moat that deepens with deployment
exclusions: Software-only companies calling themselves deep tech
Hardware with no path to unit economics at scale
Science projects without a commercial thesis
Companies where the technology risk is solved but the market risk is total
conviction_signal: Replace this with what makes you most confident a deal belongs in this thesis.
